song.title: Majestic Sweetness Sits Enthroned
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Majestic sweetness sits enthroned Upon the Savior’s brow; His head with radiant glories crowned, His lips with grace o’erflow, His lips with grace o’erflow.
[V2] 2) No mortal can with Him compare Among the sons of men; Fairer is He than all the fair That fill the heav’nly train, That fill the heav’nly train.
[V3] 3) To Him I owe my life and breath, And all the joys I have; He makes me triumph over death, And saves me from the grave, And saves me from the grave.
[V4] 4) To heaven, the place of His abode, He brings my weary feet; Shows me the glories of my God, And makes my joys complete, And makes my joys complete.
[V5] 5) Since from His bounty I receive Such proofs of love divine, Had I a thousand hearts to give, Lord, they should all be Thine, Lord, they should all be Thine.
song.author: Samuel Stennett
